name: qa-scribe
description: Local-first desktop testing notepad for turning testing sessions into structured testware.
author: qa-scribe contributors

scripts.lint: bun run frontend:lint && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.verify: bun run frontend:typecheck && bun run frontend:lint && bun run frontend:build && cargo fmt --all --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace && cargo run -p qa-scribe-app
